name: Herbed Bread Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Soft bread cubes (about 5 slices bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook celery and onion in margarine in a 10-inch skillet, stirring occasionally, until onion is tender.
2. Stir in about 1 cup of the bread cubes into the skillet.
3. Turn everything into a deep bowl.
4. Add remaining ingredients; toss to combine.
5. Stuff chicken just before roasting (6 or 7 servings).
6. To bake stuffing separately, turn into an ungreased quart casserole. Cover and bake in a 400°F oven for 30 minutes, then reduce temperature to 375°F and bake for another 40 minutes.
7. For corn bread stuffing, substitute corn bread cubes for the soft bread cubes.
8. For giblet stuffing, chop cooked giblets and add with the remaining ingredients.
